title: API Misuse, Oracles, Side Channels, and Defensive Boundaries · Execution Trace: Crypto Go Error Taxonomy
summary: A decryption API reports precise failure stages, accepts attacker-controlled work parameters, retries expensive operations, and exposes timing differences through caches and downstream calls. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the error taxonomy increment in cryptographic misuse and oracle threat review. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Keep useful internal typed causes and safe telemetry while exposing uniform bounded failures and terminal cleanup to untrusted callers.
Bound lengths, counts, nesting, KDF work, signature sets, certificate paths, retries, concurrency, memory, CPU, and deadlines before expensive cryptography.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Error Taxonomy · Theory Crypto Go Error Taxonomy
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 8851 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound attacker-controlled cryptographic work and move oracle and side-channel claims to native evidence; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep useful internal typed causes and safe telemetry while exposing uniform bounded failures and terminal cleanup to untrusted callers.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Error Taxonomy contract for the supplied data.
